description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironParty late, party hard and make that naughty attitude of your's live strong with tantra t-shirt. The short sleeves and wide round neck add oodles of attitude, while the graphic print exudes a happy vibe. Team this t-shirt with jeans and mildly heeled sandals and rule the world of party maniacs in style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
